raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Restaurant Reservation Anti-Piracy Act aims to prohibit third-party reservation services from arranging unauthorized reservations.",
    "The bill addresses predatory practices in the reservation market that exploit customers and harm small businesses.",
    "The Act will combat bots that book multiple reservations and resell them in a black market.",
    "Fraudulent reservations lead to no-shows, customer confusion, and negatively impact small businesses.",
    "The booking arbitrage loophole currently harms restaurant owners and consumers alike.",
    "The legislation will help protect restaurants from losing revenue due to no-shows caused by fraudulent reservations.",
    "AB 1245 will ensure that middlemen do not inflate reservation costs for families.",
    "The bill will restore the integrity of the reservation process for diners."
  ]
}
```
